items.title: Acme Corp — Master Services Agreement Renewal
items.summary: Acme Corp's MSA expires April 25. Priya Sharma sent a counter-proposal with a 12% rate increase. Legal review pending — James Okonkwo flagged indemnity clause changes. Failure to renew by deadline triggers 90-day wind-down.
items.reason: Contract deadline in 8 days with unresolved legal and pricing objections. No fallback vendor identified.

updateHistory.summary: Priya Sharma responded with revised pricing terms. Indemnity clause still under legal review by James Okonkwo. Lucia Ferreira requested executive sign-off by April 21.
updateHistory.changesDescription: New counter-proposal received from Acme procurement. Legal review still outstanding.
suggestedNextSteps: Schedule call with Priya Sharma to negotiate rate
Follow up with James Okonkwo on indemnity clause

updateHistory.summary: Procurement meeting concluded. Acme wants 12% rate increase; our budget ceiling is 8%. James Okonkwo raised indemnity clause concerns.
Scanner detected MSA renewal deadline approaching. Acme Corp contract expires April 25.

items.title: Project Aurora — Phase 2 Milestone at Risk
items.summary: Phase 2 delivery target is April 22. Two backend service dependencies remain unresolved — auth service migration and data pipeline refactor. Jordan Chen reports the pipeline work needs 5 more days.
items.reason: Milestone deadline in 5 days with two blocking dependencies and no approved timeline extension.

evidenceLinks.label: Jordan Chen — blocker update in Teams

updateHistory.summary: Jordan Chen confirmed pipeline refactor needs 5 additional days. Phase 2 milestone now at risk without timeline extension.
suggestedNextSteps: Request timeline extension from VP Engineering
Identify parallel workstreams to recover schedule

updateHistory.summary: Project risk scanner flagged Phase 2 milestone with two unresolved backend dependencies.

items.title: Meridian Labs — Tier 1 Support Escalation
items.summary: Meridian Labs filed a Tier 1 escalation: data export API returning stale results in their production environment. Sofia Martinez reports the issue affects 3 client-facing dashboards. SLA clock started April 15.
items.reason: Tier 1 SLA breach risk — 48-hour response window closes April 17 EOD. Customer threatening churn.

updateHistory.summary: Raj Patel identified root cause — cache invalidation bug in export service. Hotfix in progress, ETA tomorrow morning.
suggestedNextSteps: Send interim update to Sofia Martinez
Confirm hotfix deployment timeline with Raj Patel

updateHistory.summary: Customer escalation detected. Meridian Labs reporting stale data in export API.

items.title: FY27 Cloud Infrastructure Budget Approval
items.summary: FY27 cloud infrastructure budget request ($2.4M) submitted to finance April 10. Diana Chowdhury requested additional justification for the GPU cluster line item. Marcus Webb needs sign-off from CFO by April 21.
items.reason: Budget approval deadline April 21 — without approval, Q3 provisioning will be delayed by 6 weeks.

evidenceLinks.label: Marcus Webb — CFO briefing prep thread

updateHistory.summary: Diana Chowdhury requested GPU cluster cost justification. Marcus Webb confirmed CFO meeting is April 21.
Budget proposal submitted to finance. Tracking approval timeline.

items.title: Platform Team → Data Eng Handoff — ETL Pipeline Ownership
items.summary: Platform team transferring ETL pipeline ownership to Data Engineering. Kenji Watanabe leading transition — runbook drafts due April 18. Elena Vasquez raised concerns about on-call rotation gaps during handoff.
items.reason: Handoff deadline April 22. On-call coverage gap could cause data freshness SLA breaches for 3 downstream teams.

updateHistory.summary: Kenji Watanabe shared runbook draft v2. Elena Vasquez still flagging on-call rotation gap for April 22-24.
suggestedNextSteps: Review runbook draft and provide feedback by EOD
Propose interim on-call rotation to cover gap

updateHistory.summary: Cross-team ETL pipeline ownership transfer flagged by project risk scanner.

items.title: Northwind Corp — Enterprise Onboarding Blockers
items.summary: Northwind Corp enterprise onboarding behind schedule. SSO integration blocked on their IdP configuration. Aisha Bello reports their IT team needs 2 more days. Carlos Mendez prepping fallback auth flow.
items.reason: Onboarding delay could push go-live past contractual date. Low severity since fallback auth flow is available.

updateHistory.summary: Aisha Bello confirmed IdP config delay — ETA 2 days. Carlos Mendez has fallback auth flow ready if needed.
Northwind onboarding SSO blocker detected in customer channel.

items.title: Q2 Security Audit — 3 Medium Findings Open
items.summary: Q2 security audit completed April 12. Three medium-severity findings remain open: outdated TLS config on staging, missing rate limiting on public API, and incomplete audit logging in admin portal. Remediation plan due April 24.
items.reason: Medium findings with 2-week remediation window. No critical or high findings. Compliance team tracking.

updateHistory.summary: David Okafor completed TLS config fix on staging. Two findings remain: rate limiting and audit logging.
Security audit findings published. 3 medium findings requiring remediation by April 24.

items.title: Contoso — API Integration Health Check
items.summary: Contoso's API integration showing intermittent 429 errors during peak hours. Fatima Al-Rashid from Contoso's team shared rate limit logs. Henrik Lindqvist analyzing our gateway throttling config.
items.reason: Non-blocking integration issue — errors are transient and auto-retried. Monitoring for pattern.

updateHistory.summary: Henrik Lindqvist completed gateway analysis. 429 errors correlate with Contoso's batch sync window. Recommending staggered sync schedule.
Intermittent 429 errors detected on Contoso API integration during peak hours.

items.title: Pinnacle Systems — Data Warehouse Vendor Selection
items.summary: Vendor evaluation complete. Pinnacle Systems selected for data warehouse migration. Contract signed April 14. Kickoff meeting scheduled for next week.
items.reason: Vendor selection finalized and contract executed. No further action required.

updateHistory.summary: Pinnacle Systems contract signed. Vendor selection complete. Kickoff meeting being scheduled.
Vendor evaluation in final stage — Pinnacle Systems leading. Contract review underway.

scanners.name: Customer Escalations
scanners.prompt: Monitor email and chat channels for customer escalation signals. Look for Tier 1/Tier 2 support escalations, SLA breach warnings, churn risk language, and executive complaints. Flag any customer communication expressing urgency, dissatisfaction, or requesting management involvement.

scanners.name: Project Risks
scanners.prompt: Scan all signal types for project milestone risks, delivery blockers, resource constraints, and cross-team dependency issues. Focus on timeline slippage, blocked work items, escalation language, and budget overrun indicators. Flag any project update suggesting a deadline is at risk or a critical dependency is unresolved.

scanners.name: Contract & Compliance
scanners.prompt: Watch email and document channels for contract renewal deadlines, legal review requests, compliance audit findings, vendor agreement changes, and regulatory updates. Flag items with approaching deadlines, unsigned agreements, open audit findings, or changes to terms and conditions requiring review.

topPriorities: Respond to Acme Corp counter-proposal — indemnity clause review due today
Check in with Raj Patel on Meridian Labs hotfix deployment ETA
Review ETL runbook draft from Kenji Watanabe before handoff deadline
Prepare talking points for Q3 Planning Sync with Diana Chowdhury
Send GPU cluster cost justification for FY27 budget approval

meetingsRequiringPrep.whyPrepNeeded: Meridian Labs Tier 1 escalation is active — Sofia Martinez will expect a resolution timeline update. Northwind onboarding status also relevant.
